items.summary: Enhance the eagle logo entry animation so neon glow activates from the eagle head first. Apply strongest electric blue neon glow on eagle head and eyes visible from first frame. Head area must feel like energy source with inner illumination, medium outline glow, and soft outer ambient aura.

Create energy spread effect during eagle logo entry where glow flows smoothly from head → wings → full body with subtle light propagation effect lasting 0.4–0.6s. No flashing or harsh transitions. Add short light bloom burst at head when animation starts and optional subtle shimmer sweep once across wings.

Animate eagle logo parent container during entry with opacity 0 → 1, scale 0.85 → 1, translateY 25px → 0, duration 1–1.2s ease-out. Use GPU-accelerated transform animations only. After entry, glow stabilizes into continuous soft breathing pulse with head remaining slightly brighter than rest of eagle.

Link all 'Get Started' buttons in service details (AI Agents, AI Chatbots, Automation Services, etc.) to smoothly scroll to the Get In Touch section with animated scrolling (not instant jump). Add small press animation on button click before scrolling starts. Ensure scrolling offset accounts for sticky header so section is fully visible.
Add slight highlight effect when Get In Touch section appears after scrolling from service detail buttons: soft fade-in and subtle glow activation around contact form to draw user attention.
Enable smooth scroll behavior globally across the entire website. Add 0.6s ease transitions globally for interactive elements. Buttons must use cubic-bezier easing for smoother interaction feel.
Add fade + translateY animations to sections on scroll. Reduce sudden animation jumps. Enable GPU acceleration for all animations to improve performance and smoothness.
